text:
進撃pf20130218巨人 is the 2nd track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack II. It is also the 3rd track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

"進撃巨人" and "20130218" means Attack on Titan, made February 18th 2013. "pf" is an abbreviation of Piano/Pianoforte.

Musical motifs

The track is split into 2 parts. The first part (0:00-2:11), and the second part (2:11-4:39).
